title: ghost origin
description: this is an ethereal being with unique abilities and traits linked to the spirit realm.
body:
This powerful ghost, born from the lingering souls of those lost to time. This spirit is neither fully of the living nor the dead, existing in the liminal space between worlds, where memories and shadows twist. Its form is ever-shifting, a silhouette of translucent mist with haunting, glowing eyes that seem to pierce through time itself.

Be invisible, be able to phase through anything and give yourself night vision.
but be warned if you deside to try this dont ever cut onions with this origin
